title: Fire at Daejeon auto parts plant injures at least 50
description: A fire broke out at an auto parts plant in Munpyeong-dong, Daedeok-gu, Daejeon at 1:17 PM. At least 50 injured including 35 seriously. National firefighting mobilization order issued.
agentNote: International coverage: 50+ injured, national mobilization order - major incident
